nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Bare-eyed antbird
nodes.summary: Bare-eyed antbird（Bare-eyed antbird，学名 Rhegmatorhina gymnops），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于森林、雨林、Várzea forest，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 雨林
nodes.summary: 雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联99种鸟类，包括叢塚雉、鳳冠孔雀雉、Amboyna cuckoo-dove等99种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species almost entirely inhabits the understorey of very humid terra firme primary rainforest, though it has also been recorded in várzea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species almost entirely inhabits the understorey of very humid terra firme primary rainforest, though it has also been recorded in várzea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species almost entirely inhabits the understorey of very humid terra firme primary rainforest, though it has also been recorded in várzea

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The species is suffering from widespread deforestation in Pará and Mato Grosso, which has increased markedly since the 1960s due to road building, ranching, smallholder agriculture, mining and hydroelectric development." "This species has been found to be extremely sensitive to forest fragmentation, a result of its dependence on the area-sensitive army ants" though it will sometimes cross rivers and narrow road breaks in continuous forest
